query: How frequently in 2026 has Russia launched overnight drone barrages against Ukraine exceeding 600 drones in a single night? List specific dates and drone counts for the largest barrages in May, June, and early July 2026 according to Ukrainian Air Force figures.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of my findings on Russian overnight drone barrages against Ukraine exceeding 600 drones in 2026:

## Key Findings

**Confirmed 600+ drone single-night barrages (Ukrainian Air Force figures):**

| Date (night of) | Drone count | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **May 13–14, 2026** | **~731 drones/missiles** | Part of record ~1,560-drone two-day period (largest of the war) |
| **May 23–24, 2026** | **600 drones** (+90 missiles) | Kyiv strike with Oreshnik/Kinzhal missiles |
| **June 1–2, 2026** | **656 drones** (+73 missiles) | 22+ killed; 602 drones downed |

**Early July 2026 attacks fell BELOW the 600 threshold:**
- July 1–2: ~500 drones (very deadly but drone count under 600)
- July 3–4: only 86 drones
- July 8–9: only 94 drones

## Critical Caveat
The frequently cited **"record 728-drone / 741-aerial-weapon Lutsk attack" occurred on July 9, 2025 — NOT 2026.** Many search results conflate these two years, so this is an important distinction for your forecasting.

## Assessment
Within May–early July 2026, I identified **three** clearly documented single-night barrages at ~600+ drones (all in a roughly three-week window from mid-May to early June). Early July saw a shift toward smaller drone counts paired with heavier ballistic-missile strikes. Note this should be treated as a well-sourced **lower bound** — the authoritative primary source is the Ukrainian Air Force's daily Telegram reports, and some nights may not have surfaced in English-language coverage.

sources.title: Russia Sets New Record With 1,400+ Drones in Latest Ukraine Barrage
sources.snippet: Russia launched nearly 1,500 drones and missiles against Ukraine in a 24-hour period... Smoke... in Kyiv on May 14, 2026. ~731 drones/missiles overnight.

sources.title: Russia hammers Ukraine in biggest prolonged drone attack since war began
sources.snippet: Zelensky said Russia fired more than 1,560 drones on Ukraine since the start of Wednesday - the largest aerial attack in a two-day period since the war began.

sources.title: Russia Launches 90 Missiles and 600 Drones at Ukraine Overnight, May 23-24, 2026
sources.snippet: Russian forces attacked Ukraine with 690 air attack assets, including 90 missiles and 600 drones of various types, according to the Ukrainian Air Force.

sources.title: At least 22 people killed, dozens wounded in Russian attacks on Ukraine
sources.snippet: Russia launched 656 drones and 73 missiles at Ukraine overnight, according to Ukraine's air force; air defenses destroyed/suppressed 40 missiles and 602 drones.

sources.title: Russia Launches Drone and Missile Attack on Kyiv in Deadly 'Night of Horror'
sources.snippet: Russia launched more than 70 missiles of various types against Ukraine overnight, nearly half of them ballistic, along with almost 500 attack drones.

sources.title: Russia attacks Ukraine with two missiles and 86 drones
sources.snippet: Russia attacked Ukraine with an Iskander-M ballistic missile, a Kh-59/69 missile and 86 drones on the night of July 3-4, 2026.

sources.title: Russia attacks Ukraine with two missiles and nearly 100 drones: air defence downs 72 UAVs
sources.snippet: Russian forces attacked Ukraine with two ballistic missiles and 94 drones since the evening of 8 July; air defences downed 72 drones.

sources.title: Russia fired record number of drones at Ukraine in March, new air force data show
sources.snippet: Russia fired at least 6,462 long-range drones into Ukraine in March 2026, per AFP analysis of Air Force daily reports.

sources.title: Russia Fired Record Number of Drones at Ukraine in April - AFP Analysis
sources.snippet: Russia launched 6,583 long-range drones during April 2026, according to a compilation of daily reports published by Ukraine's air force.

sources.title: Russia launches another record drone attack, Ukrainian officials say (July 9, 2025)
sources.snippet: Russia fired a record 728 Shahed and decoy drones at Ukraine overnight, plus 13 missiles, the Ukrainian air force said - this was July 9, 2025, not 2026.

sources.title: Russia hits Ukraine's capital with a massive drone and missile attack, killing at least 18
sources.snippet: Massive July 1-2, 2026 combined drone and missile attack on Kyiv.

key_facts: Night of May 13-14, 2026: ~731 drones and missiles launched overnight per Ukrainian Air Force; part of a record 24-hour period where Russia fired more than 1,560 drones over ~2 days (largest two-day aerial attack of the war).
Night of May 23-24, 2026: 600 drones + 90 missiles (690 total air-attack assets) per Ukrainian Air Force; included Oreshnik/Kinzhal missiles, struck Kyiv.
Night of June 1-2, 2026: 656 drones + 73 missiles per Ukraine's Air Force; 602 drones and 40 missiles downed/suppressed; 22+ killed.
Night of July 1-2, 2026: ~500 attack drones + 70+ missiles (nearly half ballistic) - below the 600 threshold but extremely deadly (25+ killed, 'night of horror').
Early July 2026 nights were mostly small: July 3-4 had only 86 drones; July 8-9 had only 94 drones + 2 Iskander-M missiles.
CRITICAL: The 'record 728-drone / 741 aerial-weapon' Lutsk attack occurred July 9, 2025, NOT 2026; many search results conflate the two years.
In the May-early July 2026 window, three single-night barrages reached ~600+ drones: May 13-14 (~731), May 23-24 (600), and June 1-2 (656).
March 2026: at least 6,462 long-range drones fired (record month at the time); April 2026: 6,583 long-range drones (new monthly record) per AFP analysis of Air Force daily reports.

data_points.metric: Russian attack drones launched overnight July 1-2, 2026
Russian long-range drones fired at Ukraine in March 2026
Russian long-range drones fired at Ukraine in April 2026
Record single-night Russian attack Lutsk (JULY 9, 2025 - NOT 2026)
